assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 14: 'Affected version range | **IMPRECISE** -- "versions prior to the fix" (no precise threshold in Jira description)'; line 15: 'Fixed version | **IMPRECISE** -- "see advisory"'; lines 36-37: explicit 'Imprecise Data Warning' section stating the Jira description does not provide a precise affected version range or fixed version.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 13: Query URL 'https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901'; line 21: 'Affected range | lessThan 0.4.8 (semver)'; line 24: 'The MITRE CVE record provides a structured lessThan constraint: versions strictly less than 0.4.8 are affected.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 28: Query URL 'https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901'; line 38: 'Introduced | 0 (all versions from inception)'; line 39: 'Fixed | 0.4.8'; line 41: 'The OSV.dev record confirms that all versions of h2 prior to 0.4.8 are affected, and version 0.4.8 is the fix.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 44-55: Cross-Validation table comparing Jira (IMPRECISE), MITRE (< 0.4.8, PRECISE), and OSV.dev (fixed 0.4.8, PRECISE); line 51: 'Result: Agreement. Both external sources agree on the fix threshold'; line 59: 'Fix threshold for Step 2.3: < 0.4.8'; lines 60-61: 'This enriched threshold replaces the imprecise Jira description data for all downstream version impact comparisons.'

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md line 5: 'Using enriched fix threshold from Step 1.5: h2 < 0.4.8'; line 7: 'The imprecise Jira description ("versions prior to the fix") was not used for version comparisons.'; lines 15-19: all version comparisons use 0.4.8 threshold (e.g., '0.4.5 < 0.4.8' -> YES, '0.4.8 >= 0.4.8' -> NO).
